summary: Iteration 4 - Tested 17-language i18n + ActionToggle (silent/ring) on places. Backend: 24/24 pytest pass (9 new action tests + 15 regression). Frontend: language select shows all 17 codes (en,ar,es,fr,de,it,pt,ru,tr,id,zh,ja,ko,hi,fa,ur,he); html lang/dir attrs flip correctly (rtl for ar/he/fa/ur); Noto SC font applied for zh, JP for ja; selection persists across reload via localStorage. ActionToggle works end-to-end: dialog default silent, switch to ring before save sends POST with action:ring, card silent/ring buttons fire PUT /api/places/{id} with correct action, state persists across reload, visible in both Places (full) and Home Nearby (compact) variants.

issues: app_name 'QuietZones' only translates in Chinese (静音区); for ja/ko/hi the brand stays in Latin. Acceptable as brand, but verify intentional.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py PUT /api/places filters values with `v is not None` which is fine, but combined with `exclude_unset=True` it is redundant - a client could not send null to clear a field (low priority).
ActionToggle.jsx uses inline hex colors (#B85C5C, #7B9E87) in className strings - Tailwind JIT works but consider centralising the brand colors as Tailwind theme tokens.
PlaceCard.jsx swallows the editPlace error silently with console.error - user gets no toast if the PUT fails (e.g., offline). Consider surfacing a toast on failure.
i18n.js deepMerge is iterated at module load; for 17 languages this is fine but the merge runs on every import - not a real perf issue. OK.
languages.js: flags are emoji which may render as text on Windows older fonts; acceptable for web app.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UI_Ring place via UI to validate toggle + PUT; deleted at end. Backend tests create/cleanup TEST_* places & shares.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Selectors confirmed: lang-select with options lang-{code} for all 17; dialog-action-toggle / dialog-action-toggle-silent / dialog-action-toggle-ring; per-place action-toggle-{place_id} with -silent / -ring sub-buttons. Backend action field is Literal['silent','ring'] default silent on PlaceBase/SharePlace; PlaceUpdate accepts it independently. Add place via [data-testid=add-place-header-btn] on /places (no FAB testid). RTL langs: ar,fa,ur,he. Riyadh geo grant via context.set_geolocation(24.7136, 46.6753).
rca of the issue: n/a - feature added cleanly, all flows verified.
